---
title: "About me"
image: files/mende.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mend-amar-badral-64217a28a/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/MendeBadra
    - icon: facebook
      text: Facebook
      href: https://www.facebook.com/mendamar.badral
    - icon: google
      text: Gmail
      href: mendamar345@gmail.com
    - icon: file-pdf
      text: Download CV
      href: https://mendebadra.github.io/MendeeResume/cv.pdf

---

Hello! My name is **Mend-Amar Badral** and I am currently studing in *MSc Computer Science Engineering* programme at Budapest University of Technology and Economics (BME). 
I've recently wrote a thesis. Check it out [here](https://heyzine.com/flip-book/ba3096dda3.html).


Also don't forget to check out my [blogs](https://mendebadra.github.io/blog.html) as well.

Contact: mendamar345@gmail.com
